title: 3-Minute Anaerobic Blocks
description: Extend anaerobic tolerance, bridge to VO2max
purpose: Extend anaerobic tolerance, bridge to VO2max

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 45 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. 3:00 at 130%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/5. 120-130% FTP, 60-75 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 120-130%, Cadence: 60-75 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 3:00 at 130%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 130% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 130%, 110-130 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 130% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 130% FTP, 110-130 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 3/5. 26 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 130% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/5. 3:00 at 130%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 3:00 at 130%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 21min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 61% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 61% complete. Rep 4/5. 130% at 110-130 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% through. This is your workout. Own it. 130% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/5. 34 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 4/5. 130% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 37 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 67% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 67% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 130% for 3:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 130% × 3:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 130%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 130% for 3:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 130% × 3:00. Seated, 60-75 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 81% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
